method.description: HTTP method, such as GET, POST, empty value means no restriction.

view.description:
Return value type. Can only be filled with one of the following values:
json、text、file、redirect

invokeType.description: Call type. Currently can only be filled: script

beforeScriptId.description: Pre-processing script ID. 【Emphasis】Not the ID of the script directory, nor the name of the script, but the ID of the script file.

scriptId.description: Script ID (when invokeType=script). 【Emphasis】Not the ID of the script directory, nor the name of the script, but the ID of the script file.

afterScriptId.description: Post-processing script ID. 【Emphasis】Not the ID of the script directory, nor the name of the script, but the ID of the script file.

errorScriptId.description: Exception handling script ID. 【Emphasis】Not the ID of the script directory, but the ID of the script file.
